name: Markers of human skeletal muscle mitochondrial biogenesis and quality control: effects of age and aerobic exercise training
short_name: Aerobic training mitochondrial biogenesis and dynamics markers
summary: A human aerobic exercise training study in young and older men measuring VO2 peak, skeletal-muscle size, PGC-1alpha, oxidative enzymes, and mitochondrial fusion/fission proteins before and after 12 weeks of supervised cycling.
venue: The Journals of Gerontology. Series A, Biological Sciences and Medical Sciences
